entities.description: As a subsection of 'Other Design Considerations', this section discusses the retention of the UART2 interface, which is an important hardware design aspect for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the UART2 interface, a hardware component retained as per the design considerations in section 5.2.3.
Refers to the action of retaining or keeping the UART2 interface as specified in section 5.2.3.

relations.description: The hardware component 'UART2接口' is the primary focus of section 5.2.3.
The task of '保留' (retaining) is the central action described in section 5.2.3.
